caption: 退货通知

view.params:
SELECT wfgs.SID,wfgs.wfgs
FROM wfgs
ORDER BY wfgs.SID ASC

SELECT ywrybiao.SID,ywrybiao.bm
FROM ywrybiao
WHERE   (ywrybiao.yhm=:yhm)
ORDER BY ywrybiao.SID ASC

SELECT rypdj.SID,rypdj.rkqy
FROM rypdj
WHERE   (rypdj.ryxm=:ryxm)
ORDER BY rypdj.SID ASC

name: 退货通知
title_field: 退货通知.作 业 号
